title: Clarify release gate implementation status

riskAssessment.reason: This change only prevents documentation from overstating release automation availability.

executionDecision.reason: The repository currently has no release workflow, so documentation must state that limitation.

preReviewWarnings: Review that the documented release gate matches the workflows actually present.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Distribution documentation states that the release workflow is a follow-up, not an available command today.
A workflow test prevents the documentation from claiming an absent release workflow is active.
All existing local and governance checks remain green.
guidelines: Documentation must describe only capabilities present in the repository.
Tests must assert externally visible documentation facts.

intent.problem: The distribution page describes a manually dispatched release workflow, but the repository currently contains only smoke and compatibility workflows.
constraints: Do not implement or trigger release automation in this documentation correction.
intent.rationale: Accurate documentation prevents maintainers from assuming that tag creation is already fail-closed.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
